## Changelog
2026-07-07	v0.6	No changes; all facts re-verified
2026-07-04	v0.5	Logic audit triage
2026-07-04	v0.4	Wave-2 gap fill
2026-07-04	v0.3	Coverage expansion
2026-07-04	v0.2	External dataset audit self-correction: Gemini 2.5 Flash exact context limit
2026-07-04	v0.1	Initial dataset: 40 models across 7 providers
